meaning: n.[植] 罗马甜瓜,香瓜,哈密瓜
examples: I start to cut the cantaloupe for my sons' breakfast.
Watermelon, cantaloupe and honeydew are all healthy options for your pooch.
In the real world, what we should be eating is spinach, brussels sprouts and cantaloupe—not as compelling for many of us.
By the next summer Cantaloupe had set up shop at Arora's parents' house in Berkeley.
At last count Sowell had installed 5, 000 boxes, eliminating 40% of his truck fleet on Cantaloupe-streamlined routes.
